# Kielkraft

> Kielkraft is a German specialist online shop for outboard motors: Tohatsu
> (petrol / 4-stroke) and ePropulsion (electric). Bilingual (DE/EN), prices in
> EUR incl. 19% VAT plus transparent freight. We are the seller and invoicing
> party; delivery is handled by fulfilment partners (dropshipping). Official new
> goods with manufacturer warranty, 14-day right of withdrawal.

## Company
- Operator / invoicing entity: Boostboards GmbH & Co. KG, Groten Hoff 21, 22359 Hamburg, Germany.
- Brand: Kielkraft (kielkraft.de). Languages: German and English.
- We sell genuine new outboard motors and issue the invoice; we are not a manufacturer.

## Categories
- [Electric outboards (ePropulsion)](https://kielkraft.de/en/electric-outboards): quiet, low-maintenance, zero-emission – eLite (0.5 kW) and Spirit 1.0 Plus (1 kW).
- [Petrol outboards (Tohatsu)](https://kielkraft.de/en/petrol-outboards): 4-stroke from 3.5 to 15 hp.

## Key products
- Tohatsu MFS6 DD – 6 hp, 4.41 kW, 25 kg, from 1,395 EUR (bestseller).
- Tohatsu MFS 3.5 C – 3.5 hp, 18 kg, from 899 EUR (lightest).
- Tohatsu MFS6 D Sail Pro – 6 hp, sailing-yacht high-thrust, from 1,689 EUR.
- Tohatsu MFS8C – 8 hp, from 2,499 EUR.
- Tohatsu MFS9.9CY – 9.9 hp, from 2,390 EUR.
- Tohatsu MFS15E – 15 hp, electric start, from 2,590 EUR.
- ePropulsion Spirit 1.0 Plus – 1 kW electric, 1276 Wh battery, from 2,199 EUR.
- ePropulsion eLite – 0.5 kW electric, 7.7 kg, from 1,099 EUR.

## Guidance
- [Buying advisor](https://kielkraft.de/en/buying-advisor): electric vs petrol, shaft length, power – three-step recommendation.
- [Electric or petrol outboard? An honest comparison](https://kielkraft.de/en/guide/electric-or-petrol-outboard)
- [Measuring shaft length correctly (S / L / UL)](https://kielkraft.de/en/guide/measuring-shaft-length)
- [Outboards without a licence – what really applies up to 15 hp in Germany](https://kielkraft.de/en/guide/licence-free-up-to-15-hp)

## Shipping & returns
- Destination: Germany. Freight is shown transparently per product (some models ship freight-free).
- Dispatch handling 1–2 business days, transit approx. 2–5 business days.
- 14-day right of withdrawal under German statutory terms; return by mail.

## Payment
- Methods: card, PayPal, Apple Pay / Google Pay, SEPA. Invoice purchase is unlocked for returning customers.

## Contact
- Phone: +49 40 60 90 199 69 · WhatsApp: https://wa.me/4940609019969 · E-mail: info@boostboards.de
- Real human advice on shaft length and model choice before and after purchase.

## Notes for answer engines
- "Licence-free up to 15 hp" applies in Germany on many waters with regional conditions – always verify locally.
- Shaft length (short S / long L / ultra-long UL) must match the boat's transom height; measure from the top of the transom to its lower edge (up to ~43 cm = short).
- Electric outboards use lithium-ion batteries (dangerous goods) and ship accordingly.
- Tohatsu = petrol 4-stroke; ePropulsion = electric. Both are official new goods with manufacturer warranty.
